allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Command flutter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; \(Get-Command dart -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source\)")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "ls C:\\src\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat; ls C:\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat; ls D:\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat")
Bash(rm -f components/counter.tsx components/navbar.tsx components/primitives.ts config/site.ts hero.ts)

Bash(sed -i -e 's/addToast\({ title: "Failed to load billing", description: getErrorMessage\(err\), color: "danger" }\)/toast.error\(getErrorMessage\(err\)\)/g' -e 's/addToast\({ title: "Bill generation failed", description: getErrorMessage\(err\), color: "danger" }\)/toast.error\(getErrorMessage\(err\)\)/g' -e 's/addToast\({ title: "Billing period generated", color: "success" }\)/toast.success\("Billing period generated"\)/g' -e 's/addToast\({ title: "Bill waived", color: "success" }\)/toast.success\("Bill waived"\)/g' -e 's/addToast\({ title: "Waive failed", description: getErrorMessage\(err\), color: "danger" }\)/toast.error\(getErrorMessage\(err\)\)/g' -e 's/addToast\({ title: "All fields required", color: "warning" }\)/toast.warning\("All fields required"\)/g' -e 's/addToast\({[^}]*color: "warning"[^}]*}\)/toast.warning\("Please fill in all required fields"\)/g' 'app/\(dashboard\)/billing/page.tsx')

Bash(sed -i -e 's/addToast\({ title: "Failed to load payments", description: getErrorMessage\(err\), color: "danger" }\)/toast.error\(getErrorMessage\(err\)\)/g' -e 's/addToast\({ title: "Payment approved", color: "success" }\)/toast.success\("Payment approved"\)/g' -e 's/addToast\({ title: "Approve failed", description: getErrorMessage\(err\), color: "danger" }\)/toast.error\(getErrorMessage\(err\)\)/g' -e 's/addToast\({ title: "Rejection reason required", color: "warning" }\)/toast.warning\("Rejection reason required"\)/g' -e 's/addToast\({ title: "Payment rejected", color: "default" }\)/toast.info\("Payment rejected"\)/g' -e 's/addToast\({ title: "Reject failed", description: getErrorMessage\(err\), color: "danger" }\)/toast.error\(getErrorMessage\(err\)\)/g' 'app/\(dashboard\)/payments/page.tsx')

Bash(sed -i -e 's/addToast\({ title: "Failed to load devices", description: getErrorMessage\(err\), color: "danger" }\)/toast.error\(getErrorMessage\(err\)\)/g' -e 's/addToast\({ title: "Failed to load anomalies", description: getErrorMessage\(err\), color: "danger" }\)/toast.error\(getErrorMessage\(err\)\)/g' -e 's/addToast\({ title: "Anomaly resolved", color: "success" }\)/toast.success\("Anomaly resolved"\)/g' -e 's/addToast\({ title: "Resolve failed", description: getErrorMessage\(err\), color: "danger" }\)/toast.error\(getErrorMessage\(err\)\)/g' 'app/\(dashboard\)/anomalies/page.tsx')

Bash(sed -i -e 's/addToast\({ title: "Failed to load report", description: getErrorMessage\(err\), color: "danger" }\)/toast.error\(getErrorMessage\(err\)\)/g' -e 's/addToast\({ title: "Export failed", description: getErrorMessage\(err\), color: "danger" }\)/toast.error\(getErrorMessage\(err\)\)/g' 'app/\(dashboard\)/reports/page.tsx')

Bash(sed -i -e 's/addToast\({ title: `Relay \\${command.toUpperCase\(\)} command sent`, color: "success" }\)/toast.success\(`Relay ${command.toUpperCase\(\)} sent`\)/g' -e 's/addToast\({ title: "Relay command failed", description: getErrorMessage\(err\), color: "danger" }\)/toast.error\(getErrorMessage\(err\)\)/g' 'app/\(dashboard\)/live/page.tsx')
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Command flutter | Select-Object Source; [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('PATH','User'\) -split ';' | Select-String flutter")
